scripts.test: node -e "process.env.NODE_ENV='development'; const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const run = (s) => { const r = spawnSync('node', [s], { stdio: 'inherit', env: process.env }); if (r.status !== 0) process.exit(r.status || 1); }; run('src/test-server.js'); run('src/test-transactions.js'); run('src/test-portfolios-edits.js'); run('src/test-analysis.js');"
